description_long: This is an acoustic guitar with a classic hourglass-shaped wooden body, featuring a natural brown finish that shows signs of wear and aging, especially around the edges and lower bout. The soundboard has a central circular sound hole and a dark bridge, with six strings running from the bridge up the long, slender neck to the headstock. The back of the guitar displays a similar worn wood texture, with visible grain and a lighter central strip along the neck joint. The sides are relatively thin, and the neck appears to be made of a lighter wood, contrasting with the darker body. The headstock is fitted with six tuning pegs, three on each side, and does not display any visible brand logo or ornamentation.
description: A well-worn, natural brown acoustic guitar with a wooden body, six strings, and a classic headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sound hole, bridge, strings, and the worn finish on the soundboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's thin body depth and the profile of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back's wood grain, wear patterns, and the neck joint.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the body thickness and the neck's attachment to the body.
attribute_headstock_design: Rectangular headstock with rounded edges, three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo or ornamentation
